title: CaseFolder 共享与协作权限
conditional_reason: VM 沙箱无 pydantic/sqlmodel/fastapi 且无网络，后端 pytest 须 host .venv311 权威复跑收口；VM bind-mount page-cache 本会话硬钉前端 4 文件旧 inode（casebookApi.ts/CasebookPage.tsx + 两测试），vitest/build 须 host 复跑。两者均为环境取证限制，host Read 已逐文件确认实盘完整正确。

reuse_m5.tenant_clause: 复用 store._tenant_clause（与 M5 tenant_visibility_clause 同构：own_private OR team_shared）；未另建权限模型
reuse_m5.membership: 复用 M5 TeamService.resolve_tenant（成员关系校验，非成员降级私有）；经 app.api.team._get_service() 取同一实例 + 同一成员账本
reuse_m5.owner_only_write: 复用 store owner_user_id 取行校验（非 owner -> None -> 404）
reuse_m5.default_private: create 恒 private；team 仅经显式 /share 动作切换

share_semantics.endpoint: POST /api/casebook/folders/{id}/share（挂 casebook_router 下，不单独 include）
share_semantics.private_to_team: owner + 该 team 活跃成员 -> 原子写 team_id=team_id + visibility=team
share_semantics.read_team_context: GET list/{id} 接受 X-Team-Id 头，经 resolve_tenant 进团队态；非成员降级私有

authz_matrix.private_folder: 仅 owner 可读写；他人(含同 team) 404
authz_matrix.team_folder: owner 读写；同 team 成员(带 X-Team-Id)只读；非 owner 写 404；非成员 404
authz_matrix.cross_tenant: 伪造 X-Team-Id 非成员 -> resolve_tenant 降级私有 -> 404，不泄露存在性

body_not_opened: 共享只改 visibility/team_id 两列元数据；set_sharing 不触碰 summary/refs；出库经 sanitize_case_folder 双保险；读取仍零正文、引用 100% 带锚点

backend: apps/api/app/casebook/router.py (新增 /share 端点 + _resolve_team_service/_resolve_read_ctx + list/get 加 X-Team-Id + update ValueError 护栏)
frontend: apps/web/src/services/casebookApi.ts (新增 shareCaseFolder/toCaseFolderShareBody/CaseFolderShareInput/CaseFolderVisibility + list/get teamId + X-Team-Id 头)
apps/web/src/pages/CasebookPage.tsx (新增 owner-only ShareControl + TeamContextBar + 团队态列出)
apps/web/src/pages/CasebookPage.test.tsx (改 E7-4 留->owner 共享切换 + 非 owner 只读)

privacy_scan.note: share 路径结构性零正文：schema extra=forbid + visibility/team_id 两键；store 只写两列；日志只记 user_id_hash/case_folder_id_hash/visibility/has_team

host_reverify_commands: cd apps/api && export DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./test_e7.db && pytest tests/test_e7_casebook_sharing.py tests/test_e7_casebook_api.py tests/test_e7_casebook_contracts.py
cd ../web && npx vitest run src/pages/CasebookPage.test.tsx src/services/casebookApi.test.ts && npx vite build
next_step: 类案检索助手 E7-5 消费边界与护栏守门
